allow: PowerShell(node -e "const {chromium}=require\('playwright'\);\(async\(\)=>{const b=await chromium.launch\({headless:true}\);const p=await b.newPage\(\);try{await p.goto\('http://localhost:5199/'\);await p.waitForLoadState\('networkidle'\);const h1=await p.textContent\('h1'\);console.log\('LANDING h1:',h1\);const navBtns=await p.$$eval\('nav button',bs=>bs.map\(b=>b.textContent.trim\(\)\)\);console.log\('NAV BUTTONS:',navBtns\);}catch\(e\){console.error\(e.message\);}finally{await b.close\(\);}}\)\(\)" 2>&1)
